title: Forest Avenue Street Fair
location: Forest Avenue (1150–1400 block, closed to traffic)
summary: The biggest event of the BID year! Six blocks of Forest Avenue close to traffic for a full day of food, music, family activities, and local business showcases.
body:
The Forest Avenue Street Fair is the highlight of our summer calendar. Six blocks of the Avenue close to traffic to make way for food vendors, live entertainment, kids' activities, business showcases, and plenty of community fun.

This year's Street Fair features:
- Live music on two stages throughout the day
- 50+ food and artisan vendors
- Bounce houses and activities for kids
- Business showcase zone highlighting Forest Avenue merchants
- Car show in the 1150 block parking area
- Community resource tables from local nonprofits and government offices

Admission is free. Rain date: June 28, 2025. For vendor and sponsorship inquiries, contact the BID office.
